content:
# elizaos-plugins/plugin-pdf Daily Update (May 2, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on May 2, 2026, focused on resolving build compatibility issues. The team successfully addressed a critical dependency conflict by dropping the broken CommonJS (CJS) build to ensure proper integration with the ESM-only `@elizaos/core` package.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

### Build System & Dependency Compatibility
*   Resolved a build failure caused by the CJS bundle attempting to synchronously require the ESM-only `@elizaos/core` package.
*   Dropped the broken CJS build (`dist/cjs/index.node.cjs`) to align with the framework's ESM requirements.
*   Updated build configurations and test mocks to reflect these changes ([#9](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-pdf/pull/9)).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   None

## CLOSED ISSUES
*   None

## NEW ISSUES
*   None

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   None
